pageTitle: VeilType - Private messages in any chat
metaDescription: VeilType is an Android keyboard that encrypts messages directly inside your usual chat apps with one 8-emoji shared key. No server. No account. No cloud.
heroText: VeilType adds a private layer to the messengers people already use. Create one 8-emoji shared key, switch to Veil Mode, and encrypt text locally before it leaves the phone.
heroCardModeText: Encrypt text directly in your usual chat flow.
heroCardKeyText: Create or receive one 8-emoji key once, then use it across chats.
trustStrip2Text: If you lose the key, VeilType cannot restore it.
trustStrip3Text: Both people use the same key to encrypt and decrypt.
step1Text: Generate one 8-emoji shared key on Android. Save it locally on the device.
step2Text: Copy or share the key with the other person over any separate channel you trust.
step3Text: Open any chat, switch to Veil Mode, encrypt locally, and send ciphertext instead of plain text.
screensTitle: The private layer on top of everyday chats.
screen1Caption: Create or receive a key, then enable the keyboard.
screen2Caption: Generate, copy, share, and save a key in a few taps.
screen3Caption: Encrypt and decrypt directly from the keyboard.
screen4Caption: Text first. Voice and video capsules are secondary flows.
trustCard1Point1: Encrypts and decrypts messages locally on Android.
trustCard1Point2: Keeps the key on the device instead of a server.
trustCard1Point3: Works as a private input layer over normal chat apps.
trustCard2Point1: It does not recover lost keys.
trustCard2Point2: It does not protect a compromised phone.
trustCard2Point3: It does not replace your messenger.
faq1A: Yes. Both sides need the same 8-emoji shared key and the VeilType app to encrypt and decrypt.
faq2A: No. Encryption and key storage are local-first. There is no account system or cloud sync.
faq3Q: Can I recover a lost key?
faq3A: No. That is intentionally outside the trust model. If the key is gone, access is gone.
faq4A: No. It is a keyboard and privacy layer for chat apps you already use.
finalTitle: Keep your usual chat. Add a private layer.
finalText: Download the current Android APK, enable VeilType Keyboard, create one 8-emoji shared key, and start typing private.
footerTagline: VeilType. Private messages in any chat.
storyTitle: Five screens for one clear story.
story1Text: Show the product in one glance: local-only encryption for ordinary chats.
story2Text: Make it obvious that setup starts with one 8-emoji shared key stored on the phone.
story3Text: Show the same key being added on the second device with a simple save flow.
story4Text: This is the hero shot: VeilType inside a real messenger, encrypting in place.
story5Text: End with the result: only someone with the same key can read the message.
